panels.description: Rate of L1 allocation failures (OOM), L1 read failures, and L2 prefetch failures. Non-zero values indicate unhealthy cache operations.
panels.title: Failure Rates

panels.description: L1 eviction loop iterations and triggered runs per second.
panels.title: L1 Eviction Loop

panels.description: L1 cache memory consumption in bytes and usage ratio (0–1).
panels.title: L1 Memory Usage

panels.description: L1 cache key-level operations: reads, writes, and evictions per second.
panels.title: L1 Cache Operations

panels.description: L2 store pipeline: tasks submitted vs completed, and keys succeeded vs failed.
panels.title: L2 Store Pipeline

panels.description: L2 prefetch pipeline: lookups submitted, keys looked up vs hit, load tasks, keys loaded vs failed.
panels.title: L2 Prefetch Pipeline

panels.description: Current in-flight L2 store tasks, L2 load tasks, active prefetch jobs, and reserved memory for in-flight loads.
panels.title: Inflight Operations

panels.description: EventBus queue depth, drain lag, dropped events, and subscriber exceptions.
panels.title: Event Bus

panels.description: Average L0 (GPU) to L1 (CPU) transfer throughput per request, measured on the GPU cupy stream.
panels.title: L0 ↔ L1 Throughput (GB/s)

panels.description: Average L1 (CPU) to L2 (remote/disk) transfer throughput per task. Includes adapter queue wait + network/disk I/O.
panels.title: L1 ↔ L2 Throughput (GB/s)

panels.description: Chunks loaded into the engine, and lookup token counts (requested vs hit).
panels.title: Lookup & Engine Activity

panels.description: Token-level cache hit rate: fraction of requested tokens found in L1+L2 during lookup (contiguous prefix hits only).
panels.title: Cache Hit Rate

panels.description: L1 key-level I/O operations per second (reads and writes).
panels.title: L1 IOPS

panels.description: L2 adapter-level I/O operations per second (store and load task completions).
panels.title: L2 IOPS

panels.description: Current bytes held in each L2 adapter, sampled live from adapter.get_usage(). One line per adapter, tagged by ``l2_name``. Parallel to the L1 ``lmcache_mp_l1_memory_usage_bytes`` gauge.
panels.title: L2 Usage (current)

panels.description: Average GPU KV cache block lifetime, idle time before eviction, and time gap between consecutive accesses.
panels.title: L0 (GPU) Block Lifecycle

panels.description: Average L1 chunk lifetime, idle time before eviction, and time gap between consecutive touches.
panels.title: L1 Chunk Lifecycle

panels.description: Time from L1 chunk eviction to next reuse of the same slot. Capped at max_evict_reuse_wait. Helps size the L1 cache: if this is consistently low, more L1 capacity would improve hit rates.
panels.title: L1 Evict-to-Reuse Gap

panels.description: Time and access-count gaps between consecutive reads of the same chunk at the StorageManager level. Tagged by cache_salt. Helps evaluate cache retention effectiveness.
panels.title: SM Real Reuse Gap

panels.description: CacheBlend lookup, retrieve, and store operation rates including success, failure, and hit metrics.
panels.title: CacheBlend Operations

panels.description: CacheBlend token-level hit rate and chunk throughput for store and retrieve paths.
panels.title: CacheBlend Hit Rate & Chunks

panels.description: Waterfall view of per-request spans. Each trace shows the root 'request' span with child spans: mp.lookup_prefetch, mp.retrieve, mp.store. Click a row to open the full waterfall in Tempo.
panels.title: Request Traces
